hero.title: Studio.
hero.subtitle: We design intelligent products, services and AI systems for global organisations.

about.text: Archeco is an independent design and AI studio based in Tokyo and Europe. We partner with organisations to design, build and scale next-generation digital products and intelligent systems.

vision.text: We believe the future of products is intelligent, adaptive and system-driven. Design is no longer just interface - it defines how intelligence behaves, interacts and creates value.

approach.text: Our approach combines product thinking, human-centered design and advanced AI capabilities. We work across strategy, design and technology to deliver scalable and meaningful digital experiences.

studio.team_intro: A multidisciplinary team across design, strategy and AI systems. We collaborate internationally, combining Japanese precision with European innovation.

stats.label: Years Experience - Designing digital products across industries.
Projects Delivered - From startups to enterprise platforms.

cta.title: Let’s build your next product or AI system.

locations.desc: Our founding studio. Anchored in Japan's silence and innovation ecosystem since 2012 - where precision, craft and long-term relationships define how work is done.
Our European base. A creative and technology hub connecting the studio to EU markets, fintech, healthtech and the growing Mediterranean innovation corridor.

masashi-tsuzaki.title: Masashi Tsuzaki
masashi-tsuzaki.bio: 津﨑将氏. Experience in mobile service planning, production and UI design from an early stage. Expert in project management, service planning, qualitative research, UI/UX design and UX design management. Masashi specializes in establishing UX departments within organizations and has broad expertise across the entire project lifecycle.
masashi-tsuzaki.short_bio: UX consultant with deep expertise in project management, qualitative research, and UI/UX design.

isao-yoshida.title: Isao Yoshida
isao-yoshida.bio: 吉田功. Studied Information Design with a focus on SUI (Sensory User Interface) installations. Previously worked at a TV production company and in web media planning at Sankei Digital and docomo. Founder and first representative of ARCHECO, Isao has led major projects in smart home IoT planning and Fintech chatbot UI.
isao-yoshida.short_bio: Expert in Sensory UI and IoT device planning. Founder and first representative of ARCHECO.

masamichi-miyakawa.title: Masamichi Miyakawa
masamichi-miyakawa.bio: 宮川真道. Studied UX design and UI animation at Chiba Institute of Technology. Spent 5 years at a design consultancy leading 40+ projects for major carriers and electronics manufacturers. An expert in high-speed prototyping and experience design, Masamichi excels at translating complex concepts into tangible UI.
masamichi-miyakawa.short_bio: Specialist in UI animation and high-speed prototyping. Leads complex experience design projects.

kaya-chen.title: Kaya Chen
kaya-chen.bio: 陳萱. Originally from Taiwan with a background in Computer Science. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and Vue.js. Expertly bridges front-end engineering with high-end design principles. Fluent in Chinese, Japanese, and English, Kaya specializes in human-centric service design and new product launches as a Design Director.
kaya-chen.short_bio: Bridges the gap between engineering and design. Expert in multi-language service design.

aftab-ahmed-mostofa.title: Aftab Ahmed Mostofa
aftab-ahmed-mostofa.bio: アフタブ・アフメド・モストファ. Specialist in robust engineering and complex system architecture. Aftab ensures that ARCHECO's high-fidelity designs are translated into performant, reliable codebases across global platforms. He is a key technical pillar for international projects.
aftab-ahmed-mostofa.short_bio: Technical pillar for international projects. Ensures high-fidelity design execution.

ressie-wong.title: Ressie Wong
ressie-wong.bio: Ressie Wong. Detail-oriented designer focusing on visual language and interactive refinement. Her work combines contemporary design trends with functional usability, ensuring that ARCHECO's digital products stand out in competitive global markets.
ressie-wong.short_bio: Focuses on contemporary visual language and interactive refinement for global digital products.

marc-antoine.title: Marc-Antoine Lecat
marc-antoine.bio: マーク・アントワン. 12 years leading design for enterprise clients across Japan and Europe. UX strategy, service design and AI experience. Marc has a deep passion for bridging cultural design principles with practical, scalable applications for intelligent systems and complex interfaces.
marc-antoine.short_bio: Leading design between Japan and Europe. UX strategy, service design and AI experience.

kana-sugimoto.title: Kana Sugimoto
kana-sugimoto.bio: 杉本歌那. Oversees the core financial operations and administrative management of ARCHECO. Kana ensures that the studio's business foundation remains resilient, supporting our team of designers and engineers as they innovate for international clients.
kana-sugimoto.short_bio: Ensures the firm's resilient business foundation and supports operational excellence.

yasunori-motani.title: Yasunori Motani
yasunori-motani.bio: 茂谷保伯. Strategic consultant with a focus on business transformation and market positioning. Yasunori works closely with leadership teams to align digital product roadmaps with overarching corporate objectives, ensuring long-term success of ARCHECO's engagements.
yasunori-motani.short_bio: Strategic business transformation expert aligning product roadmaps with corporate KPIs.

yuki-susai.title: Yuki Susai
yuki-susai.bio: 須齋佑紀. Mechanical engineer background with R&D experience in Shanghai for Fujitsu General. Established ARCHECO in 2014 focused on established design processes. Yuki commits to delivering high-quality results across the entire product lifecycle, from strategy and UX to UI and profitability.
yuki-susai.short_bio: Mechanical engineer background. Established ARCHECO focused on commits to result-oriented design.

keisuke-sudo.title: Keisuke Sudo
keisuke-sudo.bio: 須藤啓介. Expert consultant in user-centered design and strategic communication. Keisuke helps bridge the gap between user needs and business capabilities, crafting digital strategies that resonate with both local and international audiences.
keisuke-sudo.short_bio: Expert in user-centered strategy and bridges user needs with technical business capabilities.

hiroki-kumazawa.title: Hiroki Kumazawa
hiroki-kumazawa.bio: 熊澤 宏起. Previously at Nissan Motor designing interiors and exteriors based on ergonomics. Former manager at a major UX/UI design consultancy leading projects for DoCoMo and Denso. As CEO of ARCHECO, Hiroki leads the vision of the studio and manages the core media and project strategies.
hiroki-kumazawa.short_bio: Automotive design background. Leads studio vision and manages global project strategies.

tomoaki-susai.title: Tomoaki Susai
tomoaki-susai.bio: 須齋友朗. Background in International Law. Manages the legal, HR, and administrative foundation of ARCHECO. As Bridge SE, he facilitates communication across the organization, ensuring operational excellence and supporting the multi-disciplinary team.
tomoaki-susai.short_bio: Facilitates organizational operations and communication across high-end project teams.

toshifumi-miyake.title: Toshifumi Miyake
toshifumi-miyake.bio: 三宅利史. Specialist in strategic digital transformation and client coordination. Toshifumi ensures that ARCHECO's design outputs remain aligned with technical constraints and business KPIs throughout the project lifecycle.
toshifumi-miyake.short_bio: Ensures business KPIs and technical constraints are aligned throughout the project lifecycle.

kohei-yanagida.title: Kohei Yanagida
kohei-yanagida.bio: 柳田恒平. Full-stack developer focusing on performant, accessible digital products. Kohei bridges the gap between high-level design concepts and robust technical realities, ensuring seamless execution of ARCHECO's most ambitious projects.
kohei-yanagida.short_bio: Full-stack developer building performant, accessible digital products at the highest scale.

yuriko-nakamura.title: Yuriko Nakamura
yuriko-nakamura.bio: 中村裕里子. Studied environmental design at Japan Women's University. Previously a UI designer at a major consultancy before joining ARCHECO. An expert in visual branding, Yuriko has led branding projects for European fashion brands and international major exhibitions.
yuriko-nakamura.short_bio: Expert in visual branding and designer team management for international major brands.

misuzu-igarashi.title: Misuzu Igarashi
misuzu-igarashi.bio: 五十嵐美鈴. A creative professional with extensive experience in brand identity and digital ecosystem design. Misuzu focuses on creating cohesive visual languages that bridge traditional aesthetics with modern digital platforms.
misuzu-igarashi.short_bio: Senior designer specializing in brand identity and cohesive digital ecosystems.

miku-takeda.title: Miku Takeda
miku-takeda.bio: 竹田未来. Expert in qualitative research and human-centered design methodologies. Miku specializes in identifying user needs through deep ethnographic research and transforming insights into actionable strategy.
miku-takeda.short_bio: UX researcher focused on qualitative methodologies and transformation of insights into strategy.

miho-yahara.title: Miho Yahara
miho-yahara.bio: 矢原美穂. Strategist focused on the intersection of business goals and user value. Miho has a background in service design and venture development, helping international teams scale their digital products.
miho-yahara.short_bio: Product strategist with expertise in service design and scaling digital ventures.

rikuto-inoue.title: Rikuto Inoue
rikuto-inoue.bio: 井上陸斗. Designer specialized in high-scale interface systems and mobile applications. Rikuto brings a precision-driven approach to every project, ensuring technical excellence and visual clarity.
rikuto-inoue.short_bio: Precision-driven UI/UX designer focused on scalable interface systems.
